productName: Collections - Full Spectrum - Hash Rosin - Sunset Sherbet - (DOH) - 1g
description: Connoisseur-grade hybrid hash rosin, where Sunset Shebert's trichomes are washed into hash and pressed into a creamy, full-spectrum concentrate bursting with flavor. Smooth, potent, and terp-heavy — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
